item.title: I did not know that
item.description: ICE now has a more money than 189 countries military budget, after the "Big Beautiful Bill" passed. Yes you heard that right, ICE has more money than all but maybe ten countries entire military spending

item.title: I'm finally employed again!
item.description: And it comes with a fancy title to boot! network engineer ? I used to be a diet network engineer as an install tech but now it's official! Also funny enough I got fired on my Fiancee's birthday and I got the offer letter on our anniversary yesterday!
item.dc:creator: Distractus

item.title: "True" Christian
item.dc:creator: KatLuvr54

item.title: Scattershot 2 - The first monsoon of the year has arrived!
item.description:
I love this one. It's dumb humor but it appeals to me. Hi. It's me. No OC here. The title isn't a reference to the post, it's a local weather report. Don't read into it.
Queck! So this is gonna be what I talk about. I needed a thing to latch onto and this is it!
Ok, thats it! Dutch! Swedish! Finnish! Spanish! Chinese, Korean, French, Japanese, Norwegian, German! We live it the motherfucking future!!!!!!!! We grew up watching anime and having to live the subs vs dubs debate, and now its paying off. We're armed with our preferences and facts to support them in an era where all the major streaming services have international films just kinda sitting there in the Action/Sci-fi/Horror/AnyCategory queue! You could be looking to watch a movie, chill for the night, pick up Troll, and find yourself listening to people delve into the old troll lore in the modern Norwegian language! Completely by accident. You're back in the subs vs dubs debate. I pick subs, but I am not here to weigh in on the debate. I am here to say it's fucking amazing that we can do that! We (in America) have not had nearly as much cross cultural experience as the rest of the world seems to get. When I was a young pirate, I knew a man who said he remembers listening to American music in Portugal, watching English and Spanish movies in Paris, and reading books with authors he couldn't even pronounce. Sure we get some of that here, but it is so strikingly wonderful to be able to sit down and peruse the entertainment achievements of other cultures, and to see how the rest of the world tackles genres we grew up watching so often we can predict what the characters are gonna do. Its wonderful watching how they treat problems we are used to seeing the same solutions for, or how they pick actors and actresses with character traits we don't usually see present in primary characters. That's all. I am just excited to get to enjoy some of the results of globalized exchange. Excited to see the other people part of our same human race and the things they are putting out for entertainment. That's all! There's *two* archives now! NSFW eromemes: https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG SFW all the rest: https://imgur.com/a/JU64V6n May your way be Green and Golden!
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: Imgur Girl Reaction Gifs - For You
item.description:
In case you all aren’t caught up on the lore, @DyingOx has been an amazing original artist here on @Imgur and has been making an I.C.U. (Imgur Cinematic Universe) of characters based on all the nerdy Imgur lifestyle moments. It’s been a good time and back in late 2022 I cosplayed as Imgur Girl (seen Below) So, as a little fun bonus for you all, I pulled these reaction gifs from the archives and uploaded em here for all future uses one posts (if ya want... this is not required - OR IS IT???). So take a peek and find your favorites! Hope you all have a good time with these :D
The Latest Imgur Girl and my original cosplay from the ole archives
When you need to downvote
When someone posts cat pics
The raised eyebrow does more work than the thumbs on this one
Huzzah!
Nope...
You did it!
Wait , no...
I also had to snag some simple jpg reactions here too… Because I couldn’t forget the Meh Vote! (Look in comments for individual Pics of these :D)
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: I’ve learned a lot in getting a divorce
item.description: Dumplin and Grits tax. Dumplin is the best thing that’s happen to me since getting a divorce. Grits is the best thing I kept from the divorce. I’ve been rediscovering who I was as a 33 year old lady. It’s weird. It’s scary. But I’m better off now than I was a year ago.
item.dc:creator: GritsForLife

item.title: Day # whatever of me trying to change people’s minds about spiders
